package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_garbage_collection_cleanup_large_slice_retained_after_truncate: Layer: Garbage collection and cleanup. Flag long-lived slices truncated to zero that still retain large backing arrays.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule540PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario540Positive(records []Rule540PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
